product_overview: Decision Intelligence Email Assistant is a professional, trust-centric email assistant platform designed to empower executives, managers, and professionals with AI-driven decision intelligence that analyzes intent, predicts outcomes, and learns from user behavior to facilitate high-fidelity professional communication and delegation.
core_goals: Deliver explainable AI-driven suggestions that build trust and demonstrate the rationale behind replies.
Provide predictive insights on potential outcomes of email responses to aid decision making.
Enable proactive and context-aware delegation of email tasks with SLAs and instructions.
Offer comprehensive email management with AI-powered metrics like urgency and sentiment.
Maintain a secure and privacy-focused environment with encrypted sensitive data handling.
Support a seamless experience across web and mobile with responsive design and accessible UI.
key_features: Dashboard Navigation with sidebar for inbox, sent, drafts, and delegation tracking.
AI-Powered Email Intelligence List with priority insights including urgency and sentiment analysis.
Detailed Email View featuring proactive reply suggestions, explainability panel, thread history, and attachment viewing.
Delegation System allowing users to assign emails to others with instructions and track delegations.
Persona Management to switch AI personas tailored to different analysis needs.
Real-time Notification System for incoming emails and critical alerts.
Landing Page with animated introduction to decision intelligence concepts.
Theme Support with robust dark and light modes using high-contrast semantic variables.
Mobile-optimized layouts with touch interactions like swipe gestures and quick actions.
Backend AI engines for intent and consequence analysis, personal decision memory, and secure attachment processing.
user_flow_summary: User logs into the platform and lands on the dashboard with unified inbox view showing AI-powered metrics.
User navigates the sidebar to access inbox, sent messages, drafts, or delegation management areas.
User selects an email to open detailed view, reviewing AI-driven analysis, proposed replies, and thread history.
User switches AI personas to customize email analysis and response style.
User delegates an email via a modal interface, specifying instructions and SLA details.
User receives real-time notifications on new emails and system alerts both on web and mobile.
On mobile, user interacts with compact headers, swipe gestures for quick actions, and scrollable stat dashboards.
validation_criteria: AI suggestions must include explainability that clarifies the reason behind each generated reply.
Predicted outcomes for replies should be presented and updated based on user edits and feedback.
Delegation workflow must allow task assignment with SLA, instructions, and status tracking.
Email analysis metrics such as urgency and sentiment must be accurate and visibly integrated in inbox and detail views.
Notification system should deliver real-time alerts without missed events across devices.
UI must support seamless dark and light themes with consistent styling matching the premium design aesthetic.
Mobile UI must be fully responsive, enabling touch gestures and ensuring all content is accessible and functional on small screens.
Backend security protocols including AES-256 encryption and secure OAuth2 integration must be validated.
Personal decision memory must demonstrate learning by adapting suggestions based on user corrections over time.
